emails.subject: Re: meter 6387 & 5192
emails.body: Re: meter 6387 5192 I created #454057 for the flow at Mtr 5192. Canny Conner is looking into mtr 6387. I will let you know when he determines what we will be doing. D Aimee Lannou 10/26/2000 10:01 AM
